title: Markers of a Mature Quality Culture
alt: Four behavioural markers of a mature pharmaceutical quality culture

items.label: Errors surface quickly
items.desc: Mistakes and near-misses reported without fear of blame

items.label: Quality has authority
items.desc: Quality can stop a batch or shipment and be respected

items.label: Data integrity is instinctive
items.desc: ALCOA+ is how people work, not a checklist for inspectors

items.label: Problems are owned
items.desc: Deviations reach true root cause; CAPAs fix the system
